name: D'Angelos Pawners & Jewelers
description_short: D'Angelos Pawners & Jewelers is a pawn shop located in Chicago's South Side offering collateral-based loans and jewelry services.
description_long: D'Angelos Pawners & Jewelers operates as a traditional pawn shop serving the Chicago community from its location at 6920 S Stony Island Ave in the 60649 zip code. The business has established itself in the pawn and jewelry sector, operating with consistent weekday and weekend hours to serve customers seeking quick cash access through collateral-based lending. Pawn shops like D'Angelos serve a critical niche in consumer finance by offering immediate liquidity to individuals who may not qualify for traditional bank loans or need cash without the lengthy approval processes associated with conventional lending. The company maintains a physical storefront presence, indicating a commitment to local community service rather than online-only operations. D'Angelos distinguishes itself through its dual focus on both pawn lending and jewelry services, suggesting expertise in evaluating and pricing jewelry items specifically. The business operates during standard retail hours (9:30 AM - 5:00 PM weekdays, 9:30 AM - 4:00 PM Saturdays), making it accessible to working individuals. What sets pawn shops apart from other emergency lending options is the absence of credit checks, income verification, or underwriting delays—borrowers simply pledge collateral and receive immediate cash. However, pawn loans come with explicit trade-offs: high interest rates (typically 10-25% monthly), short repayment windows (usually 60-90 days), and the risk of losing pledged items if loans aren't repaid. D'Angelos is most suitable for consumers who own valuable items and need rapid cash for genuine emergencies, though borrowers should carefully evaluate whether the cost of a pawn loan is justified compared to alternatives like personal loans, payday alternatives, or family assistance.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: No credit check required for loans—accessible to those with poor or no credit history
Immediate cash availability without multi-day application or approval processes
Local physical storefront in Chicago South Side serves the community directly
Specialized jewelry evaluation expertise given dual pawn and jewelry business model
Consistent operating hours (9:30 AM - 5:00 PM weekdays) accommodate working customers
No debt obligation if item isn't reclaimed—only lose the collateral, not face collection actions
cons: Pawn loans carry high monthly interest rates (industry standard 10-25% APR equivalent), making them expensive relative to personal loans or credit union alternatives
Short repayment windows (typically 60-90 days) create time pressure and risk of losing valuable possessions
Limited financial information available on website—no transparency regarding specific interest rates, loan terms, or maximum loan amounts
Website is a Waze directions page only, lacking dedicated business website with service details, pricing, or customer information
best_for: Individuals with poor or no credit history who need immediate cash and have valuable collateral
People facing genuine short-term emergencies (medical bills, car repairs, eviction prevention) who own jewelry or other valuables
Consumers seeking to avoid credit inquiries or debt obligations associated with traditional lending
diagnosis: D'Angelos Pawners & Jewelers is best for individuals with valuable items who need immediate cash without credit checks and can afford to lose their collateral if repayment isn't possible. The primary caveat is that pawn loans are expensive compared to payday alternatives, personal loans, or credit union PALs—borrowers should explore these options first unless they specifically need same-day cash and lack access to traditional lending.
services: Pawn loans against personal property collateral
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
